features.name: Homepage
features.description: Dual gateway landing page with toggle for Consumer and Business portals

features.name: Consumer Portal
features.description: D2C shopping section with product listing, details, and quiz. Global Search in Navbar.

features.name: Authentication

features.name: Recipe Hub
features.description: Recipe listing page with generated images

features.description: Shopping cart functionality using React Context with Subscription support

features.name: Business Portal
features.description: B2B section for wholesale with pricing calculator, compliance docs, and Sample Kit form. Global Search in Navbar.
